news.headline: GOL, Brazilian airline, announces 4Q24 earnings; part of ABRA Group, one of Brazil's leading airlines.
news.summary: Today, GOL Linhas Aéreas Inteligentes S.A. (B3: GOLL4), a major airline in Brazil under the ABRA Group, revealed its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2024 (4Q24) in São Paulo. The figures are reported in Brazilian currency.

news.headline: tHIS ASEAN 2025 features 200+ exhibitors and 5,000+ industry professionals, highlighting South Asia's medical tech market.
news.summary: Taking place alongside the APHM Conference & Exhibition, tHIS ASEAN 2025 in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, brings together over 200 exhibitors and more than 5,000 industry professionals. The event is a prominent medical and healthcare exhibition in the ASEAN region, attracting a significant number of participants.

news.headline: Knightscope to offer 625,000 shares of common stock at $2.75/share, raising $1.7 million. Closing by March 31, 2025.

(NASDAQ: KSCP) has revealed its recent agreement for the sale of 625,000 shares of common stock at $2.75 per share in a registered direct offering. The company specializes in autonomous security robots and AI technologies. The transaction is set to finalize around March 31, 2025, pending standard closing requirements.

news.summary: In February, the Federal Reserve's favored gauge of inflation indicated that underlying price pressures remained constant.

news.headline: CCA Financial acquires Macquarie Equipment Finance Ltd's IT lease portfolio, expands with Toronto office. - March 28, 2025.
news.summary: In Richmond, Virginia on March 28, 2025, CCA Financial (CCA) disclosed its acquisition of the enterprise IT and associated equipment lease portfolio from Macquarie Equipment Finance Ltd. This move solidifies CCA's position as a premier independent provider of equipment and technology leasing solutions. The transaction involves a significant number of leases and showcases CCA's strategic growth in the market.

news.headline: QuesTek Innovations named one of Fast Company's 2025 Most Innovative Companies for materials powering space exploration.
news.summary: In Evanston, Illinois on March 28, 2025, QuesTek Innovations was named one of Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies of 2025 for its significant contributions in creating materials essential for space exploration. news.headline: UK's PM Starmer: The UK is in talks with the US to mitigate the impact of tariffs.
24 nurses and NPs at Mass General Brigham Occupational Health join MNA, aiming to enhance patient care and workplace influence.
news.summary: In Boston on March 28, 2025, a group of 24 registered nurses and nurse practitioners from Mass General Brigham Occupational Health Services came together to unionize. Their primary goal is to enhance patient care quality and ensure they have an equitable say in workplace decisions. This move marks a significant change in the healthcare sector, reflecting a growing trend towards empowering healthcare workers.

news.headline: Keep Inc. reported 2024 annual results: RMB 2,065.7m in total revenues with gross profit at RMB 965.4m and adjusted net loss at RMB 469.6m. Initiatives impacted near-term profitability but are crucial for long-term competitiveness. Loss in 2024 at RMB 534.7m compared to profit in 2023. Cash balance at RMB 1.2b.
news.summary: Keep Inc., China's largest online fitness platform, released its audited 2024 annual results showcasing total revenues of RMB 2,065.7 million, with a 16.0% increase in self-branded fitness products revenue. Gross profit stood at RMB 965.4 million with a 46.7% margin. Adjusted net loss was RMB 469.6 million. The company had 29,921 average monthly active users and 3,162 subscribing members in 2024. Despite a 3.4% decrease in total revenue, Keep saw a 0.8% increase in self-branded fitness products revenue but a 7.8% decrease in online membership and paid content revenue. The gross profit increased slightly to RMB965.4 million with a margin of 46.7%. The company also completed a share repurchase program of 11,538,500 shares.

news.headline: Liven AS has released its audited annual report for 2024 with no differences from the unaudited interim report. Find on the website.
news.summary: Liven AS has finalized its consolidated audited annual report for 2024, approved by the supervisory board for submission to the upcoming annual general meeting of shareholders. The financial results remain unchanged from the unaudited interim report released on 30 January. The full audited annual report for 2024 can be accessed on the Liven AS website at https://liven.ee/investor/aruanded/.

However, traders are optimistic about its medium-term trajectory, with a 7-day trend showing an 8.2% increase. Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) saw a 6.1% drop, priced at $0.00001334 with a market cap of $7.9 billion, but a 5.8% 7-day uptrend. Meanwhile, Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) also decreased by 6.1%, priced at $0.057830 with a market cap of $3.3 billion and a 7.7% 7-day increase. Trader Tardigrade noted Dogecoin's shift to an uptrend on the daily chart with higher highs and higher lows, signaling a potential rally ahead. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

Plasencia Cigars collaborate with Grammy winner October London at Black Leaf Cigar & Wine Lounge in St. Petersburg, FL.

Stay tuned for more updates on this unique partnership!

news.headline: February's Personal Consumption Expenditures price index rose 2.5% year-over-year, casting doubt on near-term rate cuts.
news.summary: In February, the Federal Reserve's favored inflation measure surpassed expectations, with the Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) price index rising by 2.5% year-over-year. This matched both the previous figure and economist predictions. Excluding volatile food and energy prices, the core PCE index, preferred by the Fed, increased by 2.8% from a year earlier, slightly higher than January's adjusted 2.7%. This unexpected rise highlights the challenges in reaching the 2% target and dampens hopes for imminent interest rate reductions. The data was released by the Bureau of Economic Analysis, with the monthly PCE increase of 0.3% aligning with forecasts.

news.headline: In February, inflation stayed steady despite Trump's trade tensions, as per Fed's preferred measure.
news.summary: In February, the Federal Reserve's favored measure of inflation revealed that underlying price pressures remained present.

news.headline: Kornit Digital filed its Form 20-F for 2024 with SEC. Access report at SEC's website or Kornit Digital's IR website.
news.summary: Kornit Digital LTD., a leading provider of sustainable digital fashion and textile production technologies, has recently submitted its annual report for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2024. The report, filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, includes the company's audited financial statements. Investors and stakeholders can access this information on the SEC's website (http://www.sec.gov) or Kornit Digital's investor relations website (https://ir.kornit.com/financial-information/sec-filings).

news.headline: PVH stock to report Q4 earnings on March 31, potential $500 monthly from dividends, analysts expect $3.22 EPS, revenue $2.34B.
news.summary: PVH Corp. (NYSE:PVH) is scheduled to disclose its Q4 financial results on Monday, March 31. Analysts anticipate earnings per share to be around $3.22, a decrease from the previous year's $3.72. The company is expected to generate $2.34 billion in revenue for the quarter, a decline from $2.49 billion last year. Citigroup analyst Paul Lejuez reiterated a Neutral rating on PVH, lowering the price target from $123 to $72, while Telsey Advisory Group analyst Dana Telsey maintained an Outperform rating, reducing the price target from $130 to $90. PVH presently provides an annual dividend yield of 0.22%. Investors are closely monitoring the situation for potential gains.

Investors in AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ: APP) advised by Berger Montague of May 5, 2025, deadline for a securities lawsuit.

news.headline: Stratus Properties Inc. posts net income of $2.0 million for 2024, compared to $14.8 million loss in 2023.

This has led to Palantir outperforming major software giants as the artificial intelligence sector faces challenges.

news.headline: Space Force selects Rocket Lab to compete for $5.6 billion launch contracts, boosting rival's shares.
news.summary: Rocket Lab has been selected by Space Force to participate in competitions for launch contracts valued at a total of up to $5.6 billion. Following this announcement, shares of the rival company SpaceX experienced an increase in value. The decision to choose Rocket Lab as a contender for the contracts has caused a positive reaction in the market and among investors, leading to a notable rise in the stock price of SpaceX's competitor.

news.headline: Fed's key inflation rate rises just before Trump tariffs; S&P 500 futures slip, aiming to avoid third-day loss streak.
news.summary: The upcoming release of the Federal Reserve's vital inflation report comes at a crucial time as the S&P 500 endeavors to break a three-day period of losses. The inflation rate, a key metric closely monitored by the Fed, has been heating up in anticipation of the looming impact of Trump's proposed tariffs. The S&P 500 futures are showing a decline, signifying a potentially challenging trading day ahead for investors. This development is garnering live coverage and is keeping market participants on edge as they wait for crucial updates.

news.headline: Assets of The Mill post-production facility in LA to be auctioned on April 10 by CA Global Partners. Char count: 87
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, CA Global Partners, a top auction firm, announced the upcoming auction of Technicolor's The Mill assets. The Mill, a prestigious post-production and editing facility in Los Angeles, will be up for auction on April 10. Stand by for this eventful sale.

news.headline: LifeVac partners with ASC NY as jersey sponsor to promote choking awareness, credited with saving over 3,700 lives globally.

news.headline: Global Medical Humidifier Market to reach US$1,211.7 million by 2029, growing at 5.6% CAGR. Increased ICU admissions drive demand.
news.summary: The global Medical Humidifier Market was valued at US$878.4 million in 2023, expected to grow at a CAGR of 5.6%, reaching US$922.8 million in 2024 and an impressive US$1,211.7 million by 2029. Factors include increased ICU and NICU admissions, rising neonatal mortality & preterm birth rates, aging populations, and escalating healthcare costs. The shift from hospital to home settings, along with expansions in hospital networks, drives demand for humidification devices. Opportunities arise from government initiatives in respiratory health and post-pandemic demand for respiratory care. The market is segmented into Heated Humidifier, Bubble Humidifier, Heat and Moisture Exchangers (HMEs), and Humidifier Accessories, with HMEs showing the highest growth rate. Adult patients dominate the market due to age-related lung issues, postoperative ventilation, and the increasing elderly population. The market is expected to soar owing to these key factors as highlighted in a detailed PDF publication available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: ARS partners with Bluon to enhance HVAC service using AI and equipment data. Location: Irvine, California and Memphis, Tennessee. March 28, 2025.
news.summary: In a significant development, Bluon, a top HVAC data and AI technology company, has partnered with American Residential Services (ARS) to incorporate their advanced AI Tech Support and extensive equipment database into the ARS field service platform. news.headline: Michael Montford launching long-only investment partnership PC3 Partners spinning out of Tallwoods Capital, led by Gabe Plotkin.

The firm will operate as a long-only investment partnership and is spinning off from Tallwoods Capital, which is managed by Gabe Plotkin. This development marks a significant move in the finance industry and showcases Montford's leadership in the changing landscape. news.headline: MySize's 2024 revenue reached $8.26 million, up 18%. Cash reserves more than doubled, now at $4.88 million. Shareholders' equity rose 46% to $6.91 million.
news.summary: In the latest financial report, MySize, Inc. revealed impressive growth numbers. Revenue surged by 18% year-over-year, reaching $8.26 million. The company also saw a significant increase in cash and cash equivalents, soaring by 123% to $4.88 million. Shareholders' equity witnessed a notable rise of 46% to $6.91 million. MySize is based in AIRPORT CITY, Israel, and the news was announced on March 28, 2025. The company trades on NASDAQ under the symbol MYSZ and on the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange under the symbol MYSZ.TA.

news.headline: NextNRG, Inc. outperformed January with record revenue in February 2025, boosting smart fueling operations.

The increased revenue highlights a significant growth in business and customer engagement. This positive trend is expected to strengthen NextNRG's position in the market and drive further expansion. news.headline: Ocean Biomedical has been granted patent rights in China for bispecific antibodies targeting CHI3L1 and PD1 to enhance tumor cell cytotoxicity.
news.summary: Ocean Biomedical, Inc. (NASDAQ: OCEA) based in Providence, R.I., revealed that the China National Intellectual Property Administration (CNIPA) has recently approved a patent for its novel bispecific antibodies that target CHI3L1 and PD1. These antibodies aim to improve T cell-mediated cytotoxicity against cancer cells, infectious diseases, and fibrosis. The announcement was made on March 28, 2025, marking a significant milestone for the company in the treatment of various diseases.

news.headline: Delta Air Lines to discuss Q1 2025 financial results in webcast on April 9 at 10 a.m. ET.Key details: NYSE: DAL, live webcast available at ir.delta.com.
